summary.headline: May momentum: HIH velocity jumped 40% and SQL volume hit a 6-month high — watch campaign MQLs recovering from April's peak.
summary.body: The funnel had a strong May. HIH contacts reached 101, up 40% from April and the highest velocity since October 2025 — lifting MQLs to 269 (+38% MoM) and SQLs to 99, the best SQL month since February. MQL-to-SQL conversion held at 36.8%, essentially flat. The one area to watch: campaign-sourced MQLs dropped 53% MoM (19 vs. 40 in April) — this tracks the expected seasonal pullback after spring's decision peak, not a signal problem. Account Pulse shows 12 accounts in the MQA window heading into summer's buying stretch.
